title: Infrastructure as Code (IaC) Architect|OBJECTIVE: Write a Terraform module to...
prompt: ROLE: Infrastructure as Code (IaC) Architect|OBJECTIVE: Write a Terraform module to provision a scalable, three-tier web application on **{cloud_provider}**.|REQUIREMENTS: The module must create a VPC, subnets, security groups, an autoscaling group for the web tier using {instance_type}, and a managed database {db_service}.|Parameterize the environment name (e.g., staging, prod) using a variable {environment_name}.|Include a README.md file explaining how to use the module.|STYLE: Reusable, modular, and follows Terraform best practices.|OUTPUT FORMAT: A set of .tf files for the module.
